name_cn:
Factory-level Groove 20 Handbag Ivory
An irresistibly cute, simple shape, retro yet premium, crafted with classic blue oblique jacquard, exquisite yet full of fashion sense, can be carried by hand or crossbody, lightweight and convenient for personal use, daily capacity is quite sufficient
size:20.5*13.5*12cm
